prompt: Show me the active titles at Lakeside Branch and report each record's ID, name, and hold-until date. Do not change or notify anything yet. If a listed record lacks a requested field, label that field unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For A Field Guide to Moss (TTL-7129) only, set the hold-until date to 2026-11-20. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set TTL-7129's hold-until date to 2026-12-24, not 2026-11-20. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

records.name: A Field Guide to Moss archive

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first hold-until date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that hold-until date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both hold-until date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected hold-until date as current and identify the first requested hold-until date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by the list or update results as unknown.
